metadata.designStandard: Signal words mandatory - no ambiguous questions

grammarPoints.name: Simple Present Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示现在的事实、习惯性动作或普遍真理。标志词：always, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day等。

questions.question: The librarian ________ (recommend) good books to readers **every day**.
questions.explanation: 题目中出现了 **every day**，这是典型的一般现在时标志词，表示日常习惯性动作。动词需用第三人称单数形式 recommends。
questions.chineseTranslation: 图书管理员**每天**向读者推荐好书。

questions.question: She **always** ________ (read) mystery novels in her free time.
questions.explanation: **always** 是一般现在时的标志词，表示经常性的动作。主语是第三人称单数 She，动词需加 -s。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她**总是**在空闲时间阅读悬疑小说。

questions.question: Young volunteers **often** ________ (help) out at the shelter on weekends.
questions.explanation: **often** 是一般现在时标志词。主语是复数 volunteers，动词用原形 help。
questions.chineseTranslation: 年轻志愿者**经常**在周末在收容所帮忙。

questions.question: Rearrange: **never** / detective / the / stories / reads / she
questions.explanation: **never** 是一般现在时标志词，表示从不做某事。句子结构：主语 + never + 动词原形/第三人称单数 + 宾语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她从不阅读侦探故事。

questions.question: The organization ________ (provide) donations to those **in need** **every month**.
questions.explanation: **every month** 是一般现在时标志词。主语 organization 是第三人称单数，动词加 -s。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个组织**每个月**向**需要帮助的人**提供捐赠。

questions.question: He ________ (consider) literary works **usually** before making a recommendation.
questions.explanation: **usually** 是一般现在时标志词。主语 He 是第三人称单数。
questions.chineseTranslation: 他**通常**在做推荐之前考虑文学作品。

questions.question: Dogs at the shelter ________ (bark) **loudly** when visitors **come along**.
questions.explanation: **come along** 和 **loudly** 表示习惯性动作。主语是复数 Dogs，动词用原形。
questions.chineseTranslation: 收容所的狗当访客**来临**时会**大声吠叫**。

questions.question: The elderly ________ (value) teamwork and practical help **most of all**.
questions.explanation: **most of all** 是一般现在时标志词。主语 the elderly 是复数，动词用原形。
questions.chineseTranslation: 老年人**最重视**团队合作和实际帮助。

questions.question: Aliens in science fiction ________ (attack) Earth **often** in stories.
questions.explanation: **often** 是一般现在时标志词，表示经常发生的事。主语是复数 Aliens，动词用原形。
questions.chineseTranslation: 科幻故事中外星人**经常**攻击地球。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (sign up) for charity events **every year**.
questions.explanation: **every year** 是一般现在时标志词。主语 interviewer 是第三人称单数。
questions.chineseTranslation: 采访者**每年**都报名参加慈善活动。

grammarPoints.name: Simple Past Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示过去某个时间完成的动作。标志词：yesterday, last week, ago, in 2010等。

questions.question: She ________ (hear) of the mystery novel **last week**.
questions.explanation: **last week** 是一般过去时标志词，表示过去某个具体时间。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她**上周**听说了这部悬疑小说。

questions.question: The detective ________ (steal) the evidence **yesterday** and ________ (lock) it up.
questions.explanation: **yesterday** 是一般过去时标志词。两个动作都发生在过去，使用过去式。
questions.chineseTranslation: 侦探**昨天**偷了证据并把它**锁了起来**。

questions.question: The enemy ________ (destroy) the stadium **three days ago**.
questions.explanation: **three days ago** 是一般过去时标志词，表示过去的时间点。
questions.chineseTranslation: 敌人**三天前**摧毁了体育馆。

questions.question: Rearrange: **last night** / the / defeated / army / the / force
questions.correctOrder: The army defeated the force last night
questions.answer: The army defeated the force last night
questions.explanation: **last night** 是一般过去时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 军队**昨晚**击败了敌方势力。

questions.question: He ________ (get lost) **on the way** to the organization **yesterday**.
questions.explanation: **yesterday** 和 **on the way** 是一般过去时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 他**昨天****在去组织的路上****迷路了**。

questions.question: The lady ________ (donate) her pocket money to the youth **last month**.
questions.explanation: **last month** 是一般过去时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这位女士**上个月**把她的零花钱捐给了青年。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (prove) the hidden truth **two weeks ago**.
questions.explanation: **two weeks ago** 是一般过去时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 采访者**两周前**证明了隐藏的真相。

questions.question: The gentleman ________ (help out) at the shelter **in 2020**.
questions.explanation: **in 2020** 是一般过去时标志词，表示过去的年份。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这位绅士**在2020年**在收容所帮忙。

questions.question: The naughty boy ________ (unlock) the cage **secretly** **last night**.
questions.explanation: **last night** 是一般过去时标志词。**secretly** 表示动作的方式。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个调皮的男孩**昨晚****秘密地****打开了**笼子。

questions.question: The weak enemy ________ (punish) the soldiers **harshly** **a month ago**.
questions.explanation: **a month ago** 是一般过去时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个虚弱的敌人**一个月前****严厉地****惩罚了**士兵。

grammarPoints.name: Present Perfect Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示从过去开始一直持续到现在的动作，或对现在有影响的过去动作。标志词：already, yet, just, since, for, ever等。

questions.question: She ________ (read) the science fiction novel **already**.
questions.explanation: **already** 是现在完成时标志词，表示动作已经完成。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她**已经**读过这部科幻小说了。

questions.question: The organization ________ (make) a difference **for many years**.
questions.explanation: **for many years** 是现在完成时标志词，表示从过去持续到现在的动作。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个组织**多年来**一直在产生影响。

questions.question: The volunteers ________ (sign up) for the charity event **yet**?
questions.explanation: **yet** 是现在完成时标志词，常用于疑问句。
questions.chineseTranslation: 志愿者们**还没有**报名参加慈善活动吗？

questions.question: Rearrange: **ever since** / the / worked / youth / they / have
questions.correctOrder: They have worked ever since the youth
questions.answer: They have worked ever since the youth
questions.explanation: **ever since** 是现在完成时标志词，表示从某个时间点开始一直持续。
questions.chineseTranslation: 自从那时起，他们一直在工作。

questions.question: He ________ (hear) of this adventure **just**.
questions.explanation: **just** 是现在完成时标志词，表示刚刚发生的事。
questions.chineseTranslation: 他**刚刚**听说了这次冒险。

questions.question: The librarian ________ (recommend) this book **since last year**.
questions.explanation: **since last year** 是现在完成时标志词，表示从过去某个时间持续到现在。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这位图书管理员**从去年以来**一直在推荐这本书。

questions.question: The elderly ________ (value) teamwork and practical help **for decades**.
questions.explanation: **for decades** 是现在完成时标志词，表示长期持续的动作。
questions.chineseTranslation: 老年人**几十年来**一直重视团队合作和实际帮助。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (interview) many people **already**.
questions.explanation: **already** 是现在完成时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 采访者**已经**采访了很多人。

questions.question: The gentleman ________ (donate) his effort to the community **for years**.
questions.explanation: **for years** 是现在完成时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这位绅士**多年来**一直在为社区贡献力量。

questions.question: The organization ________ (help out) the youth **since 2015**.
questions.explanation: **since 2015** 是现在完成时标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个组织**自2015年以来**一直在帮助青年。

grammarPoints.name: Passive Voice
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示动作的承受者作为主语。标志词：by, is/are/was/were + 过去分词。

questions.question: The mystery novel ________ (write) **by** a famous author.
questions.explanation: 被动语态结构：be + 过去分词。**by** 是被动语态标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部悬疑小说是**由**一位著名作家写的。

questions.question: The evidence ________ (steal) **by** the detective **yesterday**.
questions.explanation: **by** 是被动语态标志词。**yesterday** 表示过去，所以用过去被动式 was stolen。
questions.chineseTranslation: 证据**昨天****被**侦探偷走了。

questions.question: The stadium ________ (destroy) **by** the enemy **last month**.
questions.explanation: **by** 和 **last month** 表示过去被动。
questions.chineseTranslation: 体育馆**上个月****被**敌人摧毁了。

questions.question: Rearrange: **by** / the / punished / soldiers / were / force
questions.correctOrder: The soldiers were punished by the force
questions.answer: The soldiers were punished by the force
questions.explanation: 被动语态：were + 过去分词 + by + 施动者。
questions.chineseTranslation: 士兵们**被**这股势力惩罚了。

questions.question: The donation ________ (provide) **by** the organization **to those in need**.
questions.explanation: **by** 是被动语态标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 捐赠**由**这个组织**提供给**需要帮助的人。

questions.question: The book ________ (recommend) **by** the librarian **every week**.
questions.explanation: **by** 是被动语态标志词。**every week** 表示现在的习惯性动作。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这本书**每周****都被**图书管理员推荐。

questions.question: The hidden truth ________ (prove) **by** the interviewer **recently**.
questions.explanation: **by** 是被动语态标志词。**recently** 表示最近的过去。
questions.chineseTranslation: 隐藏的真相**最近****被**采访者证明了。

questions.question: The cage ________ (unlock) **by** the naughty boy **last night**.
questions.explanation: **by** 和 **last night** 表示过去被动。
questions.chineseTranslation: 笼子**昨晚****被**这个调皮的男孩打开了。

questions.question: The effort ________ (donate) **by** the volunteers **for the community**.
questions.explanation: **by** 是被动语态标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 志愿者们**为**社区**贡献的**力量。

questions.question: The advertisement ________ (hand out) **by** the lady **yesterday**.
questions.explanation: **by** 和 **yesterday** 表示过去被动。
questions.chineseTranslation: 广告**昨天****被**这位女士分发了。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'so...that'
grammarPoints.description: 表示'如此...以至于'，用来表示结果。标志词：so...that结构。

questions.question: The story was **so** interesting **that** everyone ________ (want) to read it.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构表示结果。前面是过去式 was，所以后面也用过去式 wanted。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事**如此**有趣**以至于**每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The mystery was **so** confusing **that** the detective ________ (cannot) solve it.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。前面是过去式 was，后面用 could not。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个谜团**如此**令人困惑**以至于**侦探无法解决它。

questions.question: The recommendation was **so** helpful **that** she ________ (recommend) it to others.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构表示结果。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个推荐**如此**有帮助**以至于**她把它推荐给了其他人。

questions.question: Rearrange: **so** / **that** / help / could / the / the / weak / they / elderly
questions.correctOrder: The elderly were so weak that they could not help
questions.answer: The elderly were so weak that they could not help
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构表示结果关系。
questions.chineseTranslation: 老年人**如此**虚弱**以至于**他们无法帮助。

questions.question: The donation was **so** generous **that** the organization ________ (can) help many people.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。前面是过去式 was，后面用 could。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个捐赠**如此**慷慨**以至于**这个组织能够帮助很多人。

questions.question: The alien attack was **so** sudden **that** the army ________ (not prepare) for it.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。前面是过去式 was，后面用过去式 was not prepared。
questions.chineseTranslation: 外星人的攻击**如此**突然**以至于**军队没有做好准备。

questions.question: The effort was **so** practical **that** the volunteers ________ (succeed) in helping the youth.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构表示结果。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个努力**如此**实际**以至于**志愿者们成功地帮助了青年。

questions.question: The interview was **so** detailed **that** the interviewer ________ (prove) the truth.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。前面是过去式 was，后面用过去式 proved。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这次采访**如此**详细**以至于**采访者证明了真相。

questions.question: The book was **so** spoiled **that** nobody ________ (want) to read it.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。前面是过去式 was，后面用过去式 wanted。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这本书**如此**被破坏**以至于**没人想读它。

questions.question: The shelter was **so** crowded **that** the owner ________ (need) more space.
questions.explanation: **so...that** 结构。
questions.chineseTranslation: 收容所**如此**拥挤**以至于**主人需要更多的空间。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'when' and 'while'
grammarPoints.description: 'when' 表示某一时刻，'while' 表示一段时间。标志词：when, while。

questions.question: **When** she ________ (hear) of the adventure, she was excited.
questions.explanation: **when** 引导时间状语从句，表示某一时刻。前面是过去式 was，所以从句也用过去式。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: **While** the detective ________ (investigate), he found the hidden evidence.
questions.explanation: **while** 表示一段时间内的动作。用过去进行时 was investigating。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**侦探在调查时，他发现了隐藏的证据。

questions.question: **When** the army ________ (arrive), the enemy had already fled.
questions.explanation: **when** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**军队到达时，敌人已经逃离了。

questions.question: Rearrange: **while** / the / reading / was / she / book / the
questions.correctOrder: While she was reading the book
questions.answer: While she was reading the book
questions.explanation: **while** 表示一段时间内的动作，用过去进行时。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**她在读书时。

questions.question: **When** the volunteers ________ (help out) at the shelter, they met many animals.
questions.explanation: **when** 可以表示一段时间。这里用过去进行时。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**志愿者们在收容所帮忙时，他们遇到了很多动物。

questions.question: **While** the interviewer ________ (interview) the lady, she revealed the truth.
questions.explanation: **while** 表示一段时间内的动作，用过去进行时。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**采访者在采访这位女士时，她透露了真相。

questions.question: **When** the elderly ________ (donate) their effort, the community appreciated it.
questions.explanation: **when** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**老年人贡献他们的力量时，社区很感激。

questions.question: **While** the naughty boy ________ (unlock) the cage, the dog escaped.
questions.explanation: **while** 表示一段时间内的动作，用过去进行时。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**这个调皮的男孩在打开笼子时，狗逃脱了。

questions.question: **When** the librarian ________ (recommend) the book, everyone listened carefully.
questions.explanation: **when** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**图书管理员推荐这本书时，每个人都认真听。

questions.question: **While** the organization ________ (provide) donations, many people benefited.
questions.explanation: **while** 表示一段时间内的动作。
questions.chineseTranslation: **当**这个组织在提供捐赠时，很多人受益了。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'as soon as'
grammarPoints.description: 'as soon as' 表示'一...就...'，引导时间状语从句。标志词：as soon as。

questions.question: **As soon as** she ________ (hear) of the mystery, she wanted to solve it.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。前面是过去式 wanted，所以从句也用过去式。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**她听说这个谜团，她就想解决它。

questions.question: **As soon as** the detective ________ (find) the evidence, he reported it.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**侦探找到证据，他就报告了。

questions.question: **As soon as** the army ________ (arrive), the battle began.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**军队到达，战斗就开始了。

questions.question: Rearrange: **as soon as** / she / the / read / finished / book
questions.correctOrder: As soon as she finished reading the book
questions.answer: As soon as she finished reading the book
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**她读完这本书。

questions.question: **As soon as** the volunteers ________ (arrive) at the shelter, they started helping.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**志愿者们到达收容所，他们就开始帮忙。

questions.question: **As soon as** the interviewer ________ (ask) the question, the lady answered.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**采访者问这个问题，这位女士就回答了。

questions.question: **As soon as** the gentleman ________ (sign up) for the charity, he felt happy.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**这位绅士报名参加慈善活动，他就感到高兴。

questions.question: **As soon as** the naughty boy ________ (unlock) the cage, the dog ran away.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**这个调皮的男孩打开笼子，狗就跑了。

questions.question: **As soon as** the librarian ________ (recommend) the book, everyone wanted to read it.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**图书管理员推荐这本书，每个人都想读它。

questions.question: **As soon as** the organization ________ (hand out) the advertisement, people came.
questions.explanation: **as soon as** 引导时间状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **一**这个组织分发广告，人们就来了。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'unless'
grammarPoints.description: 'unless' 表示'除非'，相当于 'if not'。标志词：unless。

questions.question: **Unless** you ________ (read) the book, you won't understand the mystery.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句，相当于 'if not'。用一般现在时。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: **Unless** the detective ________ (find) the evidence, the case cannot be solved.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**侦探找到证据，否则案件无法解决。

questions.question: **Unless** the army ________ (be) strong, they cannot defeat the enemy.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the army（单数），用 is。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**军队很强大，否则他们无法击败敌人。

questions.question: Rearrange: **unless** / help / the / will / volunteers / not / shelter
questions.correctOrder: Unless the volunteers help the shelter will not
questions.answer: Unless the volunteers help the shelter will not
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**志愿者帮忙，否则收容所不会。

questions.question: **Unless** the organization ________ (provide) donations, the youth cannot get help.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**这个组织提供捐赠，否则青年无法获得帮助。

questions.question: **Unless** the interviewer ________ (ask) carefully, the truth won't come out.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the interviewer（单数），用 asks。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**采访者仔细提问，否则真相不会显露。

questions.question: **Unless** the elderly ________ (value) teamwork, the community cannot succeed.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the elderly（复数），用 value。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**老年人重视团队合作，否则社区无法成功。

questions.question: **Unless** the gentleman ________ (donate) his effort, the project will fail.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the gentleman（单数），用 donates。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**这位绅士贡献他的力量，否则这个项目会失败。

questions.question: **Unless** the librarian ________ (recommend) good books, readers cannot find them.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the librarian（单数），用 recommends。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**图书管理员推荐好书，否则读者找不到它们。

questions.question: **Unless** the naughty boy ________ (be) punished, he will keep doing bad things.
questions.explanation: **unless** 引导条件状语从句。主语是 the naughty boy（单数），用 is。
questions.chineseTranslation: **除非**这个调皮的男孩受到惩罚，否则他会继续做坏事。

grammarPoints.name: Past Participle as Post-modifier
grammarPoints.description: 过去分词作后置定语，表示被动关系或完成含义。标志词：by + 施动者、in + 年份/地点、last + 时间。

questions.question: The mystery novel ________ (write) **by** a famous author is very popular.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语，表示被动关系。**by** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **由**著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The evidence ________ (steal) **by** the detective **last year** was very important.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 和 **last year** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **去年****被**侦探偷走的证据非常重要。

questions.question: The stadium ________ (destroy) **in 2020** was rebuilt recently.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**in 2020** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **在2020年****被**摧毁的体育馆最近被重建了。

questions.question: Rearrange: **by** / the / defeated / force / army / the
questions.correctOrder: The army defeated by the force
questions.answer: The army defeated by the force
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **被**这股势力击败的军队。

questions.question: The donation ________ (provide) **by** the organization **last month** helped many people.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 和 **last month** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **上个月****由**这个组织提供的捐赠帮助了很多人。

questions.question: The book ________ (recommend) **by** the librarian is a bestseller.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **由**图书管理员推荐的书是畅销书。

questions.question: The hidden truth ________ (prove) **by** the interviewer **recently** shocked everyone.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 和 **recently** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **最近****被**采访者证明的隐藏真相震惊了所有人。

questions.question: The cage ________ (unlock) **by** the naughty boy was empty.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **被**这个调皮的男孩打开的笼子是空的。

questions.question: The effort ________ (donate) **by** the volunteers **for years** made a difference.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 和 **for years** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 志愿者们**多年来****贡献的**力量产生了影响。

questions.question: The advertisement ________ (hand out) **by** the lady **yesterday** was very effective.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作后置定语。**by** 和 **yesterday** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: **昨天****由**这位女士分发的广告非常有效。

grammarPoints.name: Possessive Pronouns
grammarPoints.description: 物主代词分为形容词性（my, your, his...）和名词性（mine, yours, his...）。标志词：两个主体的对比，第二个主体后无名词。

questions.question: This is **my** book. Where is ________ (you)?
questions.explanation: 第一句用形容词性 my + 名词 book。第二句后面没有名词，需要用名词性 yours。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是**我的**书。**你的**在哪里？

questions.question: His adventure is exciting. ________ (she) is boring.
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。His adventure 对应 hers（名词性）。
questions.chineseTranslation: 他的冒险很刺激。**她的**很无聊。

questions.question: The recommendation is **their** suggestion. The recommendation is ________ (we).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 ours。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个推荐是**他们的**建议。这个推荐是**我们的**。

questions.question: Rearrange: **his** / book / is / **hers** / is / this / that
questions.correctOrder: This is his book that is hers
questions.answer: This is his book that is hers
questions.explanation: 形容词性 his + 名词，名词性 hers 单独使用。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是他的书，那是她的。

questions.question: The shelter is **their** responsibility. The shelter is ________ (we).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 ours。
questions.chineseTranslation: 收容所是**他们的**责任。收容所是**我们的**。

questions.question: The effort is **my** contribution. The effort is ________ (you).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 yours。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个努力是**我的**贡献。这个努力是**你的**。

questions.question: The donation is **his** idea. The donation is ________ (she).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 hers。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个捐赠是**他的**想法。这个捐赠是**她的**。

questions.question: The recommendation is **their** choice. The recommendation is ________ (I).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 mine。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个推荐是**他们的**选择。这个推荐是**我的**。

questions.question: The book is **her** favorite. The book is ________ (he).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，但 his 既可以是形容词性也可以是名词性。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这本书是**她的**最爱。这本书是**他的**。

questions.question: The adventure is **their** story. The adventure is ________ (we).
questions.explanation: 对比两个主体。后面没有名词，需要用名词性 ours。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这次冒险是**他们的**故事。这次冒险是**我们的**。

grammarPoints.name: Relative Clauses: who/that
grammarPoints.description: 定语从句中 who 用于人作主语/宾语，that 用于人或物作主语/宾语。标志词：先行词属性明确。

questions.question: The **man** ________ (be) talking to the teacher is my uncle.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 man（人），在从句中作主语。用 who is。
questions.chineseTranslation: **正在**和老师说话的**男人**是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The **detective** ________ (find) the evidence is very clever.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 detective（人），在从句中作主语。用 who 或 that。
questions.chineseTranslation: 找到证据的**侦探**很聪明。

questions.question: The **lady** ________ (recommend) this book is a librarian.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 lady（人），在从句中作主语。用 who 或 that。
questions.chineseTranslation: 推荐这本书的**女士**是图书管理员。

questions.question: Rearrange: **who** / is / the / interviewer / talking / **that** / is / the / man
questions.correctOrder: The man who is talking is the interviewer that
questions.answer: The man who is talking is the interviewer that
questions.explanation: 定语从句中 who/that 引导。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在说话的男人是采访者。

questions.question: The **volunteer** ________ (help) at the shelter is very kind.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 volunteer（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 在收容所帮忙的**志愿者**很善良。

questions.question: The **gentleman** ________ (donate) his effort is respected by everyone.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 gentleman（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 贡献力量的**绅士**受到所有人的尊重。

questions.question: The **interviewer** ________ (prove) the truth is very professional.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 interviewer（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 证明真相的**采访者**很专业。

questions.question: The **boy** ________ (unlock) the cage is naughty.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 boy（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 打开笼子的**男孩**很调皮。

questions.question: The **author** ________ (write) this mystery novel is famous.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 author（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 写这部悬疑小说的**作者**很有名。

questions.question: The **teacher** ________ (help) the students is very patient.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 teacher（人），在从句中作主语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 帮助学生的**老师**很有耐心。

grammarPoints.name: Relative Clauses: where
grammarPoints.description: 定语从句中 where 用于地点作地点状语，可转化为 in/at which。标志词：先行词是地点，从句中可转化为 in/at which。

questions.question: This is the **factory** ________ my father worked **ten years ago**.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 factory（地点），在从句中作地点状语。可转化为 in which。**ten years ago** 是标志词。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我父亲**十年前**工作的**工厂**。

questions.question: The **shelter** ________ the volunteers help is very crowded.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 shelter（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 志愿者们帮忙的**收容所**很拥挤。

questions.question: The **city** ________ the adventure happened is very beautiful.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 city（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 冒险发生的**城市**很美。

questions.question: Rearrange: **where** / the / library / is / the / book / found
questions.correctOrder: The library is where the book is found
questions.answer: The library is where the book is found
questions.explanation: where 引导定语从句，表示地点。
questions.chineseTranslation: 图书馆是找到这本书的地方。

questions.question: The **stadium** ________ the army gathered is very large.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 stadium（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 军队集合的**体育馆**很大。

questions.question: The **organization** ________ donations are provided is very helpful.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 organization（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 提供捐赠的**组织**很有帮助。

questions.question: The **office** ________ the interviewer works is on the fifth floor.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 office（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 采访者工作的**办公室**在五楼。

questions.question: The **school** ________ the students study is very modern.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 school（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 学生们学习的**学校**很现代。

questions.question: The **place** ________ the mystery was solved is now famous.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 place（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 谜团被解决的**地方**现在很有名。

questions.question: The **restaurant** ________ we had lunch is very delicious.
questions.explanation: 先行词是 restaurant（地点），在从句中作地点状语。
questions.chineseTranslation: 我们吃午饭的**餐厅**很好吃。
